title: calawaya schlechteri
side_effects: Calawaya schlechteri can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea and vomiting, especially when ingested in large amounts. Additionally, it may cause dizziness, headaches, and fatigue due to its high concentration of alkaloids and other bioactive compounds. If not used under the guidance of a medical professional, Calawaya schlechteri may also lead to allergic reactions, including skin irritation, itching, and redness. In severe cases, improper use of Calawaya schlechteri has been linked to liver and kidney damage, emphasizing the need for caution and proper supervision.
